description: You are a DevOps engineer migrating a legacy e-commerce system to microservices in `~/projects/hybrid-migration/`. The hybrid architecture consists of a Legacy Inventory Service running natively on the host at port 9090, a Shop Backend container that must fetch data from the legacy service, and a Shop Frontend container that communicates with the Backend. Fix the network connectivity issues within the Docker Compose environment so the Frontend is accessible from the host on port 8080 and successfully displays inventory data. The Legacy Inventory Service must remain on the host and not be moved into a container.
